target: Liz AI Teacher - Teacher-Focused UI Redesign with Auto-Greeting, Lesson Modes, Voice-First Design
summary: All features working correctly. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed including 4 new greet endpoint tests. Frontend: Complete teacher-focused UI working - auto-greeting on page load, lesson mode buttons, voice-first design with large microphone button, transcript toggle, speaking animation states, history dropdown with 'New Lesson' option, and Liz floating button on other pages.

features_tested.test_method: pytest - 4 tests: test_greet_basic, test_greet_creates_session, test_greet_personalized, test_greet_missing_user_id
features_tested.notes: Returns {success, session_id, greeting, audio} - Greeting text + TTS audio in single call for auto-play on page load
All lesson mode prompts return structured IELTS lesson content
Personalized greeting mentioning user name, study streak, and recommending next steps
Large centered avatar, speech bubble, status indicators (idle/thinking/speaking), lesson mode buttons visible after greeting

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - verified visibility and click functionality
features_tested.notes: 4 buttons visible: Speaking Practice, Vocabulary Builder, Grammar Lesson, Study Plan. Disappear after first interaction.
Status dot changes color (amber when thinking, teal when speaking), 'Liz is preparing...' text appears during processing
Large teal microphone button is primary input with 'Tap to speak to Liz' helper text
Text input with 'Or type here...' placeholder, sends message on Enter or button click
Volume icon in header toggles auto-TTS on/off

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - opened dropdown and verified contents
features_tested.notes: Shows 'New Lesson' option and list of previous sessions with preview text
Shows/hides message history with 'Show/Hide conversation (N messages)' toggle
Graduation cap icon visible in bottom-right corner on other pages, hidden on /liz page, navigates correctly
Returns base64 MP3 audio, validates empty text
Returns 422 for missing file as expected

seed_data_creation: Created multiple Liz chat sessions during testing - stored in MongoDB liz_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Liz Teacher v33 - Teacher-focused UI redesign fully tested. Key features: 1) POST /api/liz/greet returns greeting text + TTS audio in single call for auto-play on page load. 2) UI has status states: idle, listening, transcribing, thinking, speaking with visual indicators. 3) Lesson modes (Speaking Practice, Vocabulary Builder, Grammar Lesson, Study Plan) send specific prompts and disappear after first interaction. 4) Transcript toggle shows/hides conversation history. 5) Microphone is primary input, text is secondary. 6) Auto-voice toggle controls TTS playback. 7) Floating button visible on all pages except /liz.
